name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(viridis)


# EXACT NGG functions from conversation
qNGG <- function(p, mu, sigma, nu, tau) {
  (1/nu) * log(((exp(mu*nu) - 1) / (log(1 - tau^(1/sigma)))) * log(1 - p^(1/sigma)) + 1)
}

bowley <- function(mu, sigma, nu, tau) {
  Q1 <- qNGG(0.25, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q2 <- qNGG(0.5, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q3 <- qNGG(0.75, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  (Q3 - 2*Q2 + Q1) / (Q3 - Q1)
}

moors <- function(mu, sigma, nu, tau) {
  Q18 <- qNGG(1/8, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q38 <- qNGG(3/8, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q58 <- qNGG(5/8, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q78 <- qNGG(7/8, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q14 <- qNGG(1/4, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  Q34 <- qNGG(3/4, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
  (Q78 - Q58 + Q38 - Q18) / (Q34 - Q14)
}

pNGG <- function(q, mu, sigma, nu, tau, lower.tail = TRUE, log.p = FALSE) {
  f <- (1 - exp(-(1/(1 - exp(mu*nu))) * log(1 - tau^(1/sigma)) * (exp(nu*q) - 1)))^(sigma)
  if (lower.tail) cdf <- f else cdf <- 1 - f
  if (!log.p) cdf else log(cdf)
}

dNGG <- function(y, mu, sigma, nu, tau, log = FALSE) {
  term <- (sigma * nu / (1 - exp(mu*nu))) * log(1 - tau^(1/sigma))
  exp_part <- exp(nu*y - (1/(1 - exp(mu*nu)))*log(1 - tau^(1/sigma))*(exp(nu*y) - 1))
  inner <- 1 - exp(-(1/(1 - exp(mu*nu)))*log(1 - tau^(1/sigma))*(exp(nu*y) - 1))
  f <- term * exp_part * inner^(sigma - 1)
  if (!log) f else log(f)
}

sNGG <- function(q, mu, sigma, nu, tau) {
  1 - pNGG(q, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
}

hNGG <- function(y, mu, sigma, nu, tau) {
  dNGG(y, mu, sigma, nu, tau) / sNGG(y, mu, sigma, nu, tau)
}

# No thematic_shiny - removed to avoid error
# No withSpinner - removed to avoid dependency issues

ui <- fluidPage(
  theme = bs_theme(version = 4, bootswatch = "flatly"),
  withMathJax(),
  titlePanel("Skewness, Kurtosis and Distribution — NGG"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.tab_ativa == 'Skewness and Kurtosis'",
        h4("Skewness and Kurtosis"),
        helpText("$$\\tau$$"),
        sliderInput("tau", NULL, min = 0.01, max = 0.99, value = 0.5, step = 0.01),
        helpText("$$\\mu_{\\tau}$$"),
        sliderInput("mu", NULL, min = 0.5, max = 10, value = 0.5, step = 0.1),
        helpText("$$\\nu_{max}$$"),
        sliderInput("nu_max", NULL, min = 3, max = 12, value = 5, step = 0.1),
        helpText("$$\\sigma_{max}$$"),
        sliderInput("sigma_max", NULL, min = 1, max = 12, value = 5, step = 0.1)
      ),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.tab_ativa == 'Distribution'",
        h4("Distribution"),
        helpText("$$\\tau$$"),
        sliderInput("tau_d", NULL, min = 0.01, max = 0.99, value = 0.5, step = 0.01),
        helpText("$$\\mu_{\\tau}$$"),
        sliderInput("mu_d", NULL, min = 0.5, max = 10, value = 2, step = 0.1),
        helpText("$$\\sigma$$"),
        sliderInput("sigma_d", NULL, min = 0.1, max = 5, value = 1, step = 0.1),
        helpText("$$\\nu$$"),
        sliderInput("nu_d", NULL, min = 0.1, max = 5, value = 1, step = 0.1),
        helpText("$$y_{max}$$"),
        sliderInput("y_max", NULL, min = 0.2, max = 20, value = 5, step = 0.1)
      )
    ),
    mainPanel(
      tabsetPanel(
        id = "tab_ativa",
        tabPanel(
          "Skewness and Kurtosis",
          plotOutput("bowley"),
          br(),
          plotOutput("moors")
        ),
        tabPanel(
          "Distribution",
          fluidRow(
            column(6, plotOutput("dist_dens")),
            column(6, plotOutput("dist_cdf")),
            column(6, plotOutput("dist_surv")),
            column(6, plotOutput("dist_haz"))
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  db <- reactive({
    nu_seq <- seq(0.3, input$nu_max, length.out = 10)
    sigma_seq <- seq(0.01, input$sigma_max, length.out = 500)
    map_df(nu_seq, function(nu) {
      data.frame(
        sigma = sigma_seq,
        v = bowley(mu = input$mu, sigma = sigma_seq, nu = nu, tau = input$tau),
        nu = nu
      )
    })
  })
  
  dm <- reactive({
    nu_seq <- seq(0.3, input$nu_max, length.out = 10)
    sigma_seq <- seq(0.01, input$sigma_max, length.out = 500)
    map_df(nu_seq, function(nu) {
      data.frame(
        sigma = sigma_seq,
        v = moors(mu = input$mu, sigma = sigma_seq, nu = nu, tau = input$tau),
        nu = nu
      )
    })
  })
  
  dd <- reactive({
    y_seq <- seq(0, input$y_max, length.out = 500)
    df <- data.frame(
      y = y_seq,
      dens = dNGG(y_seq, input$mu_d, input$sigma_d, input$nu_d, input$tau_d),
      cdf  = pNGG(y_seq, input$mu_d, input$sigma_d, input$nu_d, input$tau_d),
      surv = sNGG(y_seq, input$mu_d, input$sigma_d, input$nu_d, input$tau_d),
      haz  = hNGG(y_seq, input$mu_d, input$sigma_d, input$nu_d, input$tau_d)
    )
    df[is.finite(df$dens) & is.finite(df$cdf) & is.finite(df$surv) & is.finite(df$haz), , drop = FALSE]
  })
  
  plot_gg <- function(df, ylab, nu_max) {
    nu_seq <- seq(0.3, nu_max, length.out = 10)
    fin <- df[is.finite(df$v), ]
    ggplot(fin, aes(x = sigma, y = v, colour = as.factor(nu))) +
      geom_line(size = 0.8) +
      scale_color_manual(
        values = viridis::mako(length(nu_seq), alpha = 0.5, begin = 0, end = 0.8),
        name = expression(nu),
        labels = sprintf("%.2f", nu_seq)
      ) +
      labs(y = ylab, x = expression(sigma), title = "") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        legend.background = element_blank(),
        legend.key = element_blank(),
        legend.box = "vertical",
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.box.just = "center"
      ) +
      guides(colour = guide_legend(
        direction = "vertical", title.position = "top",
        override.aes = list(size = 1)
      )) + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(min(fin$v), max(fin$v)), xlim = c(0, max(fin$sigma)))
  }
  
  output$bowley <- renderPlot(plot_gg(db(), "Bowley Skewness", input$nu_max))
  output$moors  <- renderPlot(plot_gg(dm(), "Moors Kurtosis", input$nu_max))
  
  output$dist_dens <- renderPlot({
    req(nrow(dd()) > 0)
    ggplot(dd(), aes(x = y, y = dens)) +
      geom_line(color = "#440154", linewidth = 1) +
      labs(title = "Probability Density Function", x = "y", y = "f(y)") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
  
  output$dist_cdf <- renderPlot({
    req(nrow(dd()) > 0)
    ggplot(dd(), aes(x = y, y = cdf)) +
      geom_line(color = "#3B528B", linewidth = 1) +
      labs(title = "Cumulative Distribution Function", x = "y", y = "F(y)") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
  
  output$dist_surv <- renderPlot({
    req(nrow(dd()) > 0)
    ggplot(dd(), aes(x = y, y = surv)) +
      geom_line(color = "#21918C", linewidth = 1) +
      labs(title = "Survival Function", x = "y", y = "S(y)") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
  
  output$dist_haz <- renderPlot({
    req(nrow(dd()) > 0)
    ggplot(dd(), aes(x = y, y = haz)) +
      geom_line(color = "brown", linewidth = 1) +
      labs(title = "Hazard Function", x = "y", y = "h(y)") +
      theme_minimal()
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
